entries.value: "Ayúdame a bosquejar una historia"

entries.source: "Improve my essay introduction"
entries.value: "Mejora la introducción de mi ensayo"

entries.source: "Make this paragraph clearer"
entries.value: "Haz más claro este párrafo"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Writing Coach on inspir for communication learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Una guía práctica para usar Writing Coach en inspir para aprendizaje de comunicación, con indicaciones, bucles de estudio y hábitos de IA más seguros.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A stronger estudio loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: IA tutor

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays And Drafts: practical guide
entries.value: IA Writing Coach Para Essays And Drafts: practical guía

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts es una forma enfocada de usar la IA para aprender en lugar de recopilar respuestas pasivamente. El modo está construido alrededor de una tarea concreta: mejorar ensayos, historias, correos y argumentos con comentarios dirigidos que mantienen intacta tu voz.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Pide un primer paso pequeño en lugar de una respuesta final.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Pide a la IA que revise tu razonamiento, no solo el resultado.

entries.source: Clarify your point.
entries.value: Aclara tu punto.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Comunicación

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Termina reescribiendo la idea de memoria.

entries.source: Improve structure.
entries.value: Mejora la estructura.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Estudiantes que escriben ensayos, historias, correos electrónicos, notas de becas o argumentos.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts a try

entries.source: Revise with a reason.
entries.value: Revise con a reason.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Writing Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Reading Companion. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Inicia el modo en vivo en Writing Coach. Si quieres un formato de aprendizaje cercano, prueba Reading Companion. Para una visión más amplia de la plataforma, lee qué debería hacer un compañero de aprendizaje con IA para todos.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell el modo what you are trying to learn or produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Eso difference mostrars up in el flow. Instead of one giant respuesta, el best sessions move mediante a loop: set a goal, try something, get comentarios, repair el weak spot, and elegir el next action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Eso focus matters. A general chatbot puede respuesta almost anything, but a aprendizaje modo dars el conversación a shape. It nudges you toward el kind of thinking, práctica, comentarios, or exploration eso ayudars el idea stick.

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: El coach ofrece prioridades de revisión específicas y ejemplos de antes y después sin reemplazar tu estilo personal.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Esto is el same habit behind estudioing con IA sin cheating yourself: mantener el estudiante active. IA is most usarful when it dars you comentarios on your thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Este modo es especialmente útil para estudiantes que quieren:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prueba a explicar el paso con tus propias palabras.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Usa Writing Coach cuando quieras una sesión que empiece rápido pero aun así se adapte a ti. El primer objetivo no es sonar impresionante. El primer objetivo es hacer que el siguiente paso parezca posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Qué this modo helps with

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Dónde to go next

entries.source: Writing Coach
entries.value: Asistente de escritura

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: También puedes empezar con una versión aproximada de tu problema real. Un primer prompt desordenado está bien. La sesión puede aclarar el nivel, la audiencia, el plazo y el estilo una vez que empieces.
